messages.text: What are the key findings or summary of the uploaded document?

The uploaded document is the professional resume of Gajjela Shailasree, a Computer Science Engineering student specializing in Artificial Intelligence [SHAILASREE.pdf, p. 1]. The key details of the document include:

*   **Education**: She is pursuing a B.Tech in CSE (Artificial Intelligence) at Narayana Engineering College with an expected graduation in 2027 and a CGPA of 9.3/10. She completed her Intermediate education at Sri Chaitanya Junior College in 2023 with a score of 98.7% [SHAILASREE.pdf, p. 1].
*   **Professional Experience**: She worked as a remote Full Stack Web Developer Intern at Future Interns from January 2026 to February 2026, where she built and tested responsive web projects [SHAILASREE.pdf, p. 1].
*   **Technical Projects**: Her projects include an AI-Based Gesture & Voice Controlled Rescue Robot, a machine learning-based Instagram Spam Detection System, and an ongoing project building an AI-Powered English Speaking & Interview Coach [SHAILASREE.pdf, p. 1].
*   **Technical Skills**: Her skills span programming languages like Python and basic Java; AI/ML concepts including Machine Learning basics, OpenCV, and Speech Recognition; web technologies like HTML5, CSS3, and basic JavaScript; and tools such as Git, GitHub, VS Code, and Jupyter Notebook [SHAILASREE.pdf, p. 1].
*   **Achievements**: She was the 1st Runner-Up at the GDG Build-a-Thon 2026 and won Second Prize at the NVibes Coding Contest 2025 [SHAILASREE.pdf, p. 1].

The technologies and technical skills used include:

*   **Programming Languages:** Python and Java (Basics) [SHAILASREE.pdf, p. 1].
*   **AI/ML Concepts & Libraries:** Machine Learning (Basics), Data Preprocessing, OpenCV, MediaPipe, Speech Recognition (Speech-to-Text), Text-to-Speech, Natural Language Processing (NLP), TF-IDF, Logistic Regression, GenAI, LLMs, and Conversational AI [SHAILASREE.pdf, p. 1].
*   **Web Technologies:** HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (Basics) [SHAILASREE.pdf, p. 1].
*   **Tools & Platforms:** Git, GitHub, VS Code, and Jupyter Notebook [SHAILASREE.pdf, p. 1].
